skitarii_rangers.notes: The cog-priests' skirmishers: a fragile T3 frame with a 4+ save AND a 5+ invulnerable printed on the datasheet — our first invulnerable-save teachers. A fixed ten (one Alpha plus nine). The arc rifle (S8 AP-1 D D3, [Anti-vehicle 4+, Devastating Wounds, Rapid Fire 1]) is included as the Devastating Wounds teacher for scenario 07; profile triple-verified 2026-07-05 (Wahapedia 10th baseline + 40k.app, and confirmed unchanged by the official 11th Faction Pack, which has no arc-rifle erratum). In real games only one Ranger per squad may take it, so scenario 07 equips the whole unit via a loadout override as a documented teaching abstraction. Only Devastating Wounds fires in v1: Anti-vehicle 4+ is inert (and irrelevant against the infantry we field) and Rapid Fire 1 is inert (no range bands yet), matching how the engine treats every recorded-but-unimplemented keyword. The Alpha's Mechanicus pistol and the other special weapons (plasma caliver, arquebus) remain omitted. Skitarii Vanguard (radium carbines, [ANTI-INFANTRY 4+]) are the sibling unit if a second AdMech entry is ever wanted. Unit profile verified 2026-07-04: 10th-codex-current baseline (Wahapedia) confirmed unchanged by the official 11th-edition Faction Pack errata (June 2026).
